params.name: heading
params.description: Optional label text shown in the navy heading block. Defaults to `Do` or `Don’t` from `type`.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Optional semantic heading level for the label. Default: 3. This changes the HTML heading tag, not the visual styling.

params.name: item
params.description: Text to use within each list item.

params.name: hidePrefix
params.description: Deprecated compatibility option. When type is `dont`, hides the legacy `do not` prefix. Omit this for new work.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the root Card / Do & Don’t element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes to add to the root Card / Do & Don’t element, for example an `id`, `data-*` attribute or `aria-*` attribute.
